title: Enneads I.2: On the Virtues
description: The civic virtues are good; the purificatory virtues are better; but the highest virtues are those of the Intellect.
introduction: The civic virtues are good; the purificatory virtues are better; but the highest virtues are those of the Intellect.

translation.text: The civic virtues adorn us. The purificatory virtues free us. The contemplative virtues make us divine.
